message:
test(frankenpandas): add SeriesGroupBy integration test (br-fn5x1 / fd90.177)

fd90.177: locks in fd90.135's correction of the SeriesGroupBy method
list (which removed phantom sem/skew/kurtosis/value_counts and added
size/rank/rank_with_pct). The README's 'SeriesGroupBy' section
(lines 1173-1190) hadn't been integration-tested.

Builds two 6-element Series — revenue (numeric) + region (Utf8 with
2 unique values 'A'+'B' across 3-element groups) — and exercises:
  - revenue.groupby(&region)? returning SeriesGroupBy
  - SeriesGroupBy::sum() / mean() / std() / var() / median() / prod()
  - SeriesGroupBy::count() / min() / max() / first() / last() / size()
  - SeriesGroupBy::agg(&['sum', 'mean', 'count']) returning DataFrame
    indexed by the 2 unique regions

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 19 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
